hero.theme: Beauty, Dignity and Autonomy: The Full-Figured Woman at the Heart of Development
hero.slogan: I am Roundly Beautiful and I own it

apropos.label: About
apropos.titre: The Full-Figured Woman at the Heart of Development
apropos.texte1: Miss Ronde Cameroun is the first national pageant dedicated to celebrating the full-figured Cameroonian woman in all her beauty, dignity and autonomy.
apropos.texte2: Under the High Patronage of the Ministry of Arts and Culture, with the support of the Ministry of Tourism and the Ministry of Communication. Organized by the Association Femme Ronde Cameroun.

participer.label: Participate
participer.etape1Texte: Fill out the online application form and submit your information.
participer.etape2Texte: Our jury selects candidates for regional pre-selections.
participer.etape3Texte: Finalists compete at an unforgettable gala evening on December 29, 2026 in Yaounde.

tickets.label: Tickets
tickets.titre: Join us for the Grand Finale
tickets.desc: Payment available by credit card, PayPal, Orange Money and MTN Mobile Money.

footer.droits: 2026 Miss Ronde Cameroun. All rights reserved.
